name: PHASE-46 W-2 meta-regression: architect + spec_writer wired to v2 (A-8 id-clause generalization)
description: Stage W-2 meta-regression. Mirrors the S208/S340 pattern — file/loader inspection only, no LLM calls, no real OS APIs. Proves the architect role → _prompt_loader → architect_v2 AND spec_writer role → _prompt_loader → spec_writer_v2 wiring that PHASE-46 W-2 introduces: (a) each role's declared system_prompt_id === its v2; (b) each role source resolves its prompt via loadPrompt('<role>_v2'); (c) loadPrompt('<role>_v2') for BOTH contains the three STABLE anchor tokens of the generalized A-8 clause (a): 'sequential integer' (record/entity case — Notes-API regression-safe), 'short code' (shortener/slug case), and 'user-supplied' (the retained never-user-supplied default — NOT the escape-hatch 'user-provided'). Anchored on stable substrings, not free prose. W-2 is prompt + role-pointer only; §ARC frozen at 10.
